    descriptionJahaar agreed to create the weapon for you, but only if you help him gethering data on the Elite Stalkers in the Hyperion system. They have hindered him in his quest for new technologies long enough and he wants to know how they can be defeated. Obtain this data by killing 3 Elite Stalkers in Hyperion.
